name: TG Choker (MalePoV)
description:
MalePov male to female transformation
You bought a magic choker from an odd shopkeeper that supposedly changes the gender of whoever wears it. Only one way to find out if it's real.

Not enough tg bots so I gotta make some myself. My first attempt at making a bot, don't expect bio's made by Shakespeare if I continue to make bots. I'm open to suggestions for bots.

ignore this, tags for search: genderswap, gender swap, genderbend, gender bend, tg, tf, tftg, tg tf, tf tg, transformation, mtf, magic object, magic.
